# mnemix — GitHub Copilot Instructions

> Canonical routing is in [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md).

## Use These Agents

- `@engineer` — implementation work
- `@reviewer` — review and risk checking
- `@tester` — tests and coverage
- `@documentation` — docs and structured writeups
- `@product-owner` — requirement shaping

## Relevant Skills

Prefer the generated skills that match this repo:

- `unit-test`
- `security-scan`
- `git-workflow`
- planning
- `document-generator`
- `skill-generator`

The compliance agent is intentionally not part of this setup.

## Practical Guidance

- follow Dex for multi-step work
- consult `.ai/context/` only as needed
- prefer project docs in `docs/` when planning or architecture is involved

*Update `toolkit.config.yaml` and regenerate when project conventions change.*
